title: Panchang Calculation Doctrine

calculation_principles.tithi_policy: Moon-Sun angular separation based lunar day classification; exact algorithm and source validation to be contracted in AG74C.
calculation_principles.nakshatra_policy: Moon longitude segment classification into 27 nakshatras; exact algorithm and source validation to be contracted in AG74C.
calculation_principles.yoga_policy: Sun + Moon longitude sum segment classification; exact algorithm and source validation to be contracted in AG74C.
calculation_principles.karana_policy: Half-tithi classification; exact algorithm and exception handling to be contracted in AG74C.
calculation_principles.paksha_policy: Tithi index derived waxing/waning half-month classification; exact transition handling to be contracted in AG74C.
calculation_principles.sunrise_sunset_policy: Location/timezone day-boundary aware display; precise astronomical implementation to be contracted in AG74C.

source_requirements_for_ag74c: Define formulas or approved static lookup method.
Define location schema and approved expansion set.
Define fallback behavior for unsupported dates/locations.
